emails.subject: MG - US Regulatory Status...
emails.body: MG US Regulatory Status... Jon, Grateful if you could complete the picture for me and for Mark Taylor. Is MG London Inc. the entity that is the Clearing Member of NYMEX a Futures Commission Merchant and Commodity Trading Advisor? Do any other (MG) entities have similar registrations, and if so, what are these? Thanks Justin Forwarded by Justin Boyd/LON/ECT on 31/07/2000 20:47 From: Mark Taylor on 28/07/2000 16:44 CDT

emails.subject: Re: MG - US Regulatory Status...
emails.body: Re: MG US Regulatory Status... Justin Sorry for the delay in catching up with my e-mails. Yes, MG London Inc is the clearing member of NYMEX/COMEX and is FCM CTA. The only other MG companies who have any exchange/regulatory registrations are in the UK and are Metallgesellschaft Ltd (LME SFA, also LIFFE to come), MG Brokers Ltd (LME SFA), MG Metal Commodity Co Ltd (LME only). Rgds Jon Justin Boyd@ECT 31/07/2000 20:53
